Field.Label: The plugin discovers ESPHome devices on your LAN via mDNS (Bonjour). Each discovered device gets auto-created as an esphomeNode device plus one device per controllable entity (switch, light, etc).
Auto-create individual entity devices (switches, lights, etc):
Field.Description: If unchecked, only the parent esphomeNode device is created and entities live as dynamic states on it.

Field.Label: ESPHome devices may use an API encryption key (recommended) or password (legacy). Either way, the key is per-device. Set it in the device's Configure dialog after discovery. The default below is used when a discovered device offers no key field of its own.
Default API Encryption Key:
Field.Description: Base64-encoded; from the device's YAML 'api: encryption: key:' line. Leave blank to attempt unencrypted connection.
